experimental_design: cell-based assays and fluorescence polarization assays
we developed a cell-based reporter assay using a recombinant human embryonic kidney 293 (HEK293) cell line.
factor_value: we evaluated the toxicity of Group A and Group B compounds
number_of_biological_replicates: human brain microglia clone 3 (HMC3) cells and human induced pluripotent stem cell (iPSC)-derived neural progenitor cells (NPCs)
